faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Tqdr

questions.q: How does Tqdr Plus differ from other loyalty programs?
questions.a: Tqdr Plus is a loyalty system based on upfront payments for shop owners, while other loyalty programs are point-based.

questions.q: What is the difference between upfront payment service and subscriptions?
questions.a: Upfront payment acts as a credit for the customer (e.g., customer pays 100 for 120 credit). Subscriptions are for specific offers (e.g., pay 5 SAR for a 3 SAR discount on a meal for 6 visits).

questions.q: Are funds collected from the shop's customers?
questions.a: No funds are collected from the shop's customers.

questions.q: How long does it take to activate the service? Do I need special devices or complex integrations?
questions.a: Activation takes a maximum of 24 hours. Tqdr Plus works on any POS device or mobile phone.

questions.q: Can I track my sales and customers in real-time?
questions.a: Yes — your shop's dashboard gives you a complete picture of every transaction, every customer, and every riyal, moment by moment.

questions.q: How do I receive money in advance?
questions.a: You place an advertising board with offers next to the cashier. When a customer requests a subscription offer, they pay you, and you register them in Tqdr Plus to monitor and document the transactions.

questions.q: What happens if the number of my customers exceeds the current plan limit?
questions.a: You will receive an automatic notification to upgrade your plan — the upgrade is done with one click without any service interruption.

questions.q: Are there long-term contracts or hidden fees?
questions.a: No restrictive contracts and no hidden fees — you pay your subscription and get the full service, the decision is always yours.

questions.q: Is Tqdr+ suitable for a shop with only one branch?
questions.a: Absolutely — it was originally designed for independent shops and small projects, and it grows with you as you expand.

questions.q: Can I stop the service whenever I want?
questions.a: Yes — you can stop your subscription at any time without penalties or complex conditions.

questions.q: How does the seller know I have a balance?
questions.a: You give them your mobile number, and through the Tqdr Plus system, they know and deduct the amount, and you receive an SMS with the deduction and remaining balance.
Yes, all data and transactions are secured according to the highest protection standards.
Certainly, the support team is available via WhatsApp to assist you.

footer.description: Tqdr Plus is the ultimate solution for managing customer loyalty and saving money through local stores in an innovative and secure way.
